purpose: Rotating SearXNG SERP queries for Corsair discovery. These are search-result leads only — not HTML body scrapes. Full crawl of blackwomenleadproject.org remains gated on source-policy audit (repo-tt2u.13).

safeties.livingPersonNote: Black Women Lead includes present-day leaders; treat SERP hits as leads, never harvest private contact data.
